devices.label: Meta Ray-Ban
devices.notes: Luxottica company ID (0x0D53). Luxottica only makes eyewear, so this ID alone is a strong glasses indicator.

devices.label: Meta Ray-Ban
devices.notes: Meta Platforms Technologies ID (0x058E) with payload string 'META_RB_GLASS'. Confirmed Ray-Ban — payload string eliminates Quest false positives.

devices.label: Meta Ray-Ban
devices.notes: Meta Platforms Inc ID (0x01AB) with payload string 'META_RB_GLASS'. Only triggers on confirmed Ray-Ban payload, not Quest.

devices.label: Snap Spectacles
devices.notes: Snapchat Inc (0x03C2). Snap mainly makes Spectacles for BLE devices.

devices.label: TCL RayNeo
devices.notes: TCL makes RayNeo AR glasses but also phones/tablets. Name prefix required to avoid false positives.

devices.label: Even Realities G1
devices.notes: Even Realities G1 AI glasses. No camera, AI display only.

devices.label: Solos AirGo
devices.notes: Solos AirGo smart glasses with AI assistant. No camera.

devices.label: Nreal
devices.notes: Nreal (now XREAL) - legacy company ID if registered separately.

devices.label: Vuzix
devices.notes: Vuzix smart glasses (enterprise and consumer) with camera.

devices.label: Brilliant Labs
devices.notes: Brilliant Labs Frame and Monocle AI glasses with camera.
